pokemon:cradily.name: Cradily
pokemon:cradily.summary: Cradily’s body serves as an anchor, preventing it from being washed away in rough seas. This Pokémon secretes a strong digestive fluid from its tentacles.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Cradily’s body serves as an anchor, preventing it from being washed away in rough seas. This Pokémon secretes a strong digestive fluid from its tentacles.
It lives in the shallows of warm seas. When the tide goes out, it digs up prey from beaches.
It lives in the shallows of warm seas. When the tide goes out, it digs up prey from beaches.
It lives in the shallows of warm seas. When the tide goes out, it digs up prey from beaches.
It drags its heavy body along the seafloor. It makes its nest in the shallows of warm seas. CRADILY can be seen on beaches when the tide goes out.
It ensnares prey with its eight tentacles. It then melts the prey with a strong acid before feeding.
It lives in warm seas. Its heavy body weighs it down so it won’t get washed away in rough weather.
It ensnares prey with its eight tentacles. It then melts the prey with a strong acid before feeding.
Cradily roams around the ocean floor in search of food. This Pokémon freely extends its tree trunk-like neck and captures unwary prey using its eight tentacles.
It lives in the shallows of warm seas. When the tide goes out, it digs up prey from beaches.
It lives in the shallows of warm seas. When the tide goes out, it digs up prey from beaches.
CRADILY roams around the ocean floor in search of food. This POKéMON freely extends its tree trunk-like neck and captures unwary prey using its eight tentacles.
CRADILY’s body serves as an anchor, preventing it from being washed away in rough seas. This POKéMON secretes a strong digestive fluid from its tentacles.
Once Cradily catches prey in its tentacles, it digests them whole and absorbs their nutrients.
It lives in warm seas. Its heavy body weighs it down so it won’t get washed away in rough weather.
It has short legs and can’t walk very fast, but its neck and tentacles can extend to over three times their usual length to nab distant prey.
This carnivorous Pokémon lived in primordial seas. It catches prey in its eight tentacles and dissolves them with digestive fluid as it eats.
Normally, it lived on shallow sea shoals. When the tide went out, this Pokémon came up on land to search for prey.
It lives in the shallows of warm seas. When the tide goes out, it digs up prey from beaches.
It lives in the shallows of warm seas. When the tide goes out, it digs up prey from beaches.
It lives in the shallows of warm seas. When the tide goes out, it digs up prey from beaches.
It ensnares prey with its eight tentacles. It then melts the prey with a strong acid before feeding.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Cradily’s body serves as an anchor, preventing it from being washed away in rough seas. This Pokémon secretes a strong digestive fluid from its tentacles.

pokemon:lileep.name: Lileep
pokemon:lileep.summary: Lileep is an ancient Pokémon that was regenerated from a fossil. It remains permanently anchored to a rock. From its immobile perch, this Pokémon intently scans for prey with its two eyes.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Lileep is an ancient Pokémon that was regenerated from a fossil. It remains permanently anchored to a rock. From its immobile perch, this Pokémon intently scans for prey with its two eyes.
It lived on the seafloor 100 million years ago and was reanimated scientifically.
It lived on the seafloor 100 million years ago and was reanimated scientifically.
It lived on the seafloor 100 million years ago and was reanimated scientifically.
It disguises itself as seaweed by making its tentacles sway. Unsuspecting prey that come too close are swallowed whole. It became extinct 100 million years ago.
It became extinct roughly 100 million years ago. It was regenerated from a fossil using advanced techniques.
It disguises its tentacles as flowers to attract and catch prey. It became extinct in ancient times.
It became extinct roughly 100 million years ago. It was regenerated from a fossil using advanced techniques.
Lileep became extinct approximately a hundred million years ago. This ancient Pokémon attaches itself to a rock on the seafloor and catches approaching prey using tentacles shaped like flower petals.
It lived on the seafloor 100 million years ago and was reanimated scientifically.
It lived on the seafloor 100 million years ago and was reanimated scientifically.
LILEEP became extinct approximately a hundred million years ago. This ancient POKéMON attaches itself to a rock on the seafloor and catches approaching prey using tentacles shaped like flower petals.
LILEEP is an ancient POKéMON that was regenerated from a fossil. It remains permanently anchored to a rock. From its immobile perch, this POKéMON intently scans for prey with its two eyes.
Lileep clings to rocks on the seabed. When prey comes close, this Pokémon entangles it with petallike tentacles.
It disguises its tentacles as flowers to attract and catch prey. It became extinct in ancient times.
This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. Lileep once lived in warm seas that existed approximately 100,000,000 years ago.
It sticks to rocks with its powerful suckers and can’t be washed away no matter how rough the surf gets.
In ancient times, it lived in warm seas. It disguised itself as seaweed to ambush its prey and devoured them whole when they got close.
It lived on the seafloor 100 million years ago and was reanimated scientifically.
It lived on the seafloor 100 million years ago and was reanimated scientifically.
It disguises its tentacles as flowers to attract and catch prey. It became extinct in ancient times.
It lived on the seafloor 100 million years ago and was reanimated scientifically.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Lileep is an ancient Pokémon that was regenerated from a fossil. It remains permanently anchored to a rock. From its immobile perch, this Pokémon intently scans for prey with its two eyes.
